sprint.goal: Restore CI baseline (systemic test-and-build failure on all PRs), then resume Go kernel wire-up (#955). P0 hook bugs (#972, #973) are resolved — path to #955 is clear once CI is green.

qa.title: Investigate systemic test-and-build CI failure on all open PRs
qa.note: All 8 open PRs fail test-and-build. rust-kernel and lint pass on most. Root cause: likely main-branch regression from recent merges (storage/inspect PRs #1078, #1081). QA agent needs to run pnpm test locally on main and identify the failing test(s).

senior.title: Go kernel wire-up + delegation (#955, #957) — unblocked after CI fix
senior.note: P0s cleared. Resume after CI baseline is restored. Do not open new PRs until test-and-build is green.

blockers.description: Systemic test-and-build CI failure across all 8 open PRs
blockers.note: rust-kernel and CodeQL pass. Failure is in TS test-and-build. Likely main-branch regression. QA must diagnose before any PR can merge.
